raw_response:
{
  "communicative_function": "affirmative declaration of adopting a belief in external restorative agency as a therapeutic step",
  "implicit_claims": [
    "a 'Power greater than ourselves' exists",
    "this Power possesses the capacity to restore sanity",
    "the speaker previously lacked sanity",
    "belief in such a Power is a necessary or effective mechanism for recovery",
    "recovery occurs through external intervention rather than solely internal processes"
  ],
  "coherence_assessment": "internally coherent only within a framework accepting undefined metaphysical agency; otherwise circular and unfalsifiable",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": "empirical evidence must show that adopting this belief reliably produces measurable improvements in mental health or sobriety without displacing evidence-based interventions",
  "conditions_for_misleading": "no such Power exists, belief fosters passivity or delays proven treatment, or 'sanity' is redefined to mean conformity to the group's ideology"
}
